advantages: Transparent prices with no hidden costs

servicesSection.title: Our Core Services
servicesSection.description: We focus on professional installation, monitoring and maintenance for surveillance systems. Pick the right service and contact us directly.

installation.title: CCTV Installation
installation.text: IP and analog camera setup for indoor and outdoor spaces, with full configuration and on-site testing.

remote.title: Remote Monitoring
remote.text: Access cameras from your phone or computer, receive instant alerts and get setup assistance.

wireless.title: Wireless Systems
wireless.text: Fast implementation for spaces with limited cabling, with optimized signal coverage.

maintenance.title: Service and Maintenance
maintenance.text: Preventive maintenance, equipment cleaning, updates and repairs for existing systems.
